mainEntity.name: What if Houston firm uses AI-generated content—bar risks?
mainEntity.text: What if Houston firm uses AI-generated content—bar risks?

acceptedAnswer.text: Texas Bar allows if human-reviewed, disclosed, non-misleading. Avoid hallucinations; cite sources to comply with ad rules.

suggestedAnswer.text: Houston attorneys must edit AI drafts for accuracy, add bylines. Undeclared AI risks deception claims. Best: 70% human input. Track via metadata. Services indemnify compliance. Clients/insurers demand transparency.

name: AI Content Risks in Houston
description: Texas Bar allows if human-reviewed, disclosed, non-misleading. Avoid hallucinations; cite sources to comply with ad rules.
